response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: High phonetic match with Ketsumeishi's 'Sakura'. 2. JSON Usage: Followed reference for accurate spelling and translation. 3. Timing: Aligned strictly with spoken audio bursts and transition points. Spoken intro and lyrics segments are fully synchronized.

subtitles.original: いくよ、早く！
subtitles.english: Let's go, hurry!

subtitles.original: あ、いた。
subtitles.english: Ah, there it is.

subtitles.original: あ、いたね。何だったんだろうね。
subtitles.english: Ah, there it is. Wonder what that was.

subtitles.original: ということで、
subtitles.english: So anyway...

subtitles.original: あ、なんか！
subtitles.english: Oh, look!

subtitles.original: なんか落ちてきたよ！
subtitles.english: Something's falling!

subtitles.original: 花びらかな？これ。
subtitles.english: Is this a flower petal?

subtitles.original: こっちから降ってきた？
subtitles.english: Did it fall from over here?

subtitles.original: ちょっと行ってみよう！
subtitles.english: Let's go check it out!

subtitles.original: さくら / ケツメイシ
subtitles.english: [Song: Sakura / Ketsumeishi]

subtitles.original: さくら舞い散る中に忘れた記憶と
subtitles.english: Amongst the scattering of the cherry blossoms, forgotten memories and...

subtitles.original: 君の声が戻ってくる
subtitles.english: ...your voice come back to me.

subtitles.original: 吹き止まない春の風 あの頃のままで
subtitles.english: The spring wind doesn't stop blowing, just like back then.

subtitles.original: 君が風に舞う髪かき分けた時の
subtitles.english: The fleeting scent from when the wind blew through your hair, fluttering it...

subtitles.original: 淡い香り戻ってくる
subtitles.english: ...comes back to me.

subtitles.original: 二人約束した あの頃のままで
subtitles.english: Just like back then, when we made a promise.

subtitles.original: ヒュルリーラ ヒュルリーラ
subtitles.english: Hyururiira, hyururiira...

subtitles.original: ヒュルリーラ ヒュルリーラ
subtitles.english: ...hyururiira, hyururiira...

subtitles.original: ヒュルリーラ ヒュルリーラ
subtitles.english: ...hyururiira, hyururiira...

subtitles.original: ヒュルリーラ ヒュルリーラ
subtitles.english: ...hyururiira, hyururiira.

subtitles.original: さくら散りだす 思い出す 意味なく
subtitles.english: The cherry blossoms start to scatter, and I remember.

subtitles.original: 灯り出す あの頃また気になる
subtitles.english: A light turns on, and again I think about back then.

subtitles.original: 変わらない香り 景色 風
subtitles.english: The scents, scenery, wind, none have changed.

subtitles.original: 違うのは君がいないだけ
subtitles.english: The thing that's different is that you're not here.

subtitles.original: ここに立つと甦る
subtitles.english: I stand here, and it's all resurrected.

subtitles.original: こみ上げる記憶 読み返す
subtitles.english: The memories fill me, I re-read them.

subtitles.original: 春風に舞う長い髪
subtitles.english: Long hair fluttering in the spring wind...

subtitles.original: たわいないことでまた騒いだり
subtitles.english: ...acting silly and having fun again.

subtitles.original: さくら木の真下 語り明かした
subtitles.english: We talked all night long beneath the cherry blossom trees.

subtitles.original: 思い出は 俺輝いた証だ
subtitles.english: Memories are my shining proof of that.

subtitles.original: さくら散る頃 出会い別れ
subtitles.english: When the cherry blossoms scatter, hellos and goodbyes.

subtitles.original: それでも ここまだ変わらぬままで
subtitles.english: Yet here, none of that has changed.

subtitles.original: 咲かした芽 君離した手
subtitles.english: Buds have bloomed, you let go of my hand.

subtitles.original: いつしか別れ 交したね
subtitles.english: Before I knew it, goodbye mixed itself in.

subtitles.original: さくら舞う季節に取り戻す
subtitles.english: In the season when the cherry blossoms scatter...

subtitles.original: あの頃そして君呼び起こす
subtitles.english: ...I'm going to take back those times and call you to life.

subtitles.original: 花びら舞い散る 記憶舞い戻る
subtitles.english: The petals scatter, the memories scatter and return.

subtitles.original: 花びら舞い散る 記憶舞い戻る
subtitles.english: The petals scatter, the memories scatter and return.

subtitles.original: 気付けばまたこの季節で 君との想い出に誘われ
subtitles.english: Before I know it, I'm seduced by my memories with you in this season.

subtitles.original: 心の扉たたいた でも手をすり抜けた花びら
subtitles.english: I knocked on the door of your heart, but the petals slipped through my fingers.

subtitles.original: 初めて分かった 俺若かった
subtitles.english: For the first time I understood, I was young.

subtitles.original: この場所来るまで 分からなかったが保存
subtitles.english: I didn't understand until I got to this place.

subtitles.original: 此処だけは今も何故 運命のように香る風
subtitles.english: Why, in this place, does the wind smell like fate?

subtitles.original: 暖かい陽の光がこぼれる 目を閉じればあの日に戻れる
subtitles.english: The warm sunlight spills down; when I close my eyes, I can go back to that day.

subtitles.original: いつしか君の面影は 消えてしまうよ 何処かへ
subtitles.english: Before I know it, your face disappears somewhere.

subtitles.original: あの日以来 景色変わらない
subtitles.english: Since then, the scenery hasn't changed.

subtitles.original: 散りゆく花びらは語らない
subtitles.english: The scattering petals don't speak.

subtitles.original: さくらの下に響いた 君の声今はもう
subtitles.english: Your voice echoes beneath the cherry blossoms, now still.

subtitles.original: さくら舞い散る中に忘れた記憶と
subtitles.english: Amongst the scattering of the cherry blossoms, forgotten memories and...

subtitles.original: 君の声が戻ってくる
subtitles.english: ...your voice come back to me.

subtitles.english: The spring wind doesn't stop blowing, just like back then.

subtitles.english: The fleeting scent from when the wind blew through your hair, fluttering it...

subtitles.original: 淡い香り戻ってくる
subtitles.english: ...comes back to me.

subtitles.english: Just like back then, when we made a promise.

subtitles.english: Hyururiira, hyururiira...

subtitles.original: ヒュルリーラ ヒュルリーラ
subtitles.english: ...hyururiira, hyururiira.

subtitles.original: そっと僕の肩に 舞い落ちたひとひらの花びら
subtitles.english: A petal softly falls onto my shoulder.

subtitles.original: 手に取り 目をつむれば君が傍にいる
subtitles.english: When I take it in my hand and close my eyes, you're by my side.
